old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.60","title":"Fix lichen-node feature-matrix builds","description":"Discovered while validating project-LICHEN-2auf.44. On local main d156a2e74, cargo test -p lichen-node --all-features fails before RPL tests because rust/lichen-node/src/dispatch.rs imports both defmt::warn and log::warn under the same macro name. cargo test -p lichen-node also fails in the default no_std configuration because hybrid.rs imports std-gated GradientTable and hybrid.rs/routing.rs call unavailable f32/f64 sin/cos methods. Fix the crate feature gating and logging macro selection without weakening tests.","acceptance_criteria":"cargo test -p lichen-node, cargo test -p lichen-node --features std, cargo test -p lichen-node --all-features, and all-feature Clippy pass; three independent reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T20:23:56.457157Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T20:23:56.457157Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.60","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T20:23:56.600675Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.60","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-17T20:23:56.729788Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Additional 2026-07-17 evidence from isolated RPL recovery worktree: cargo test -p lichen-node --features std passes 143 unit tests plus doctests. cargo check -p lichen-node --no-default-features still fails on pre-existing hybrid.rs import of std-gated GradientTable and unavailable no_std f32/f64 sin/cos methods. cargo clippy -p lichen-node --features std --all-targets -- -D warnings is blocked in pre-existing lichen-schc manual_find and too_many_arguments warnings before node completion. One pre-existing dead_code warning remains for scheduler.rs MockTransmitter::last_data. DAO cfg gating introduced by .44 compiles past its own symbols."}

new_value: {"notes":"Completed on integration/node-feature-recovery from d156a2e74. Fixed defmt/log precedence, std/no_std GradientTable gating, no_std libm math, scheduler diagnostics/dead-code warning, and two required lichen-schc strict-Clippy blockers plus unused vector field. Final gates: lichen-node default 29 tests, std 122, all-features 122; node all-feature/all-target Clippy -D warnings; thumbv7em-none-eabi/eabihf no-default checks; lichen-schc 51 tests and all-feature/all-target Clippy; git diff --check. Three closure reviews: no correctness findings; one scope opinion rejected because SCHC fixes are direct prerequisites for node all-feature Clippy acceptance. No AWS required."}
All requested default/std/all-feature tests, strict Clippy, no-default ARM checks, SCHC prerequisite gates, and three reviews pass.
